author: xliry
title: false_positive status creates scan-proof score inflation path
notes: All three claims confirmed: (1) upsert_issues only reopens fixed/auto_resolved, so false_positive findings silently persist when re-detected; (2) FAILURE_STATUSES_BY_MODE strict={open,wontfix} excludes false_positive, and target/next systems use strict_score; (3) verified_strict includes false_positive but is display-only, never used for decisions. Combined, this creates a permanent, unvalidated score inflation vector. File paths in submission use wrong prefix (engine/_state/merge_findings.py vs actual desloppify/engine/_state/merge_issues.py) and line numbers are off, but all conceptual references map correctly to real code.
